message:
✨ Integrate default cards with Clusters dashboard

- Load default cards on first visit (fall back from empty array)
- Add "Reset to Default" functionality via FloatingDashboardActions
- Track customization state to show/hide reset button
- Import getDefaultCards from lib/defaultCards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
